title: batidaea idaea
side_effects: Batidaea idaea can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing dizziness and nausea in individuals with pre-existing gastrointestinal issues. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant's extract can lead to allergic reactions, including hives and itchy skin. Furthermore, the plant's high alkaloid content can interact with certain medications, causing irregular heartbeats and decreased blood pressure. If not handled correctly, the plant can also cause skin irritation and inflammation in some individuals.
